diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,164 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware, CreateHandlersInterface
+- Reads as: ~370 lines of TypeScript
+- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/hono-base, src/types
+- Safe summary: Factory helper for creating and combining Hono handlers, supports up to 10 handler combinations
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: ~140 lines of TypeScript
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/request/constants, src/types, src/utils/url
+- Safe summary: Provides route information extraction for matched routes including path and base path with parameter substitution
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: WSEvents, defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSReadyState, UpgradeWebSocket, WSMessageReceive
+- Reads as: ~140 lines of TypeScript
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/types
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper with event handlers and upgrade functionality, includes WSContext for message control
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: ~140 lines of TypeScript
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/cookie
+- Safe summary: Cookie management functions including signed cookies for secure storage with __Host- and __Secure- prefixes
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: ~20 lines of TypeScript
+- Neighbor files: src/client, src/context
+- Safe summary: Creates a test client for mocking Hono apps with custom fetch
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents
+- Reads as: ~90 lines of TypeScript
+- Neighbor files: src/context
+- Safe summary: Detects runtime environment (node, deno, workerd, etc.) and provides type-safe environment variables
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: createCssContext, css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style
+- Reads as: ~200 lines of TypeScript
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html, src/jsx/dom/css, src/helper/css/common
+- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS helper with class name generation, keyframes, and view transitions
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString, minify
+- Reads as: ~300 lines of TypeScript
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index
+- Safe summary: CSS utility functions with class name hashing, minification, and symbol-based private fields
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: ~200 lines of TypeScript
+- Neighbor files: src/http-exception, src/utils/headers
+- Safe summary: HTTP proxy with header handling, hop-by-hop header removal, and RFC compliance mode
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: ~80 lines of TypeScript
+- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/types, src/utils/color, src/utils/handler
+- Safe summary: Development helper for listing and displaying application routes with formatted handler names
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: ~60 lines of TypeScript
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/html
+- Safe summary: HTML template rendering with escape functions and callback support for dynamic content
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: export * (ssg, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, plugins)
+- Reads as: ~15 lines of TypeScript
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg, src/helper/ssg/middleware, src/helper/ssg/plugins
+- Safe summary: Static site generation export re-exporting core SSG functionality and middleware
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, SSGPlugin, ToSSGOptions, ToSSGResult, FileSystemModule
+- Reads as: ~470 lines of TypeScript
+- Neighbor files: src/client/utils, src/hono, src/types, src/utils/concurrent, src/utils/mime, src/helper/ssg/middleware, src/helper/ssg/plugins, src/helper/ssg/utils
+- Safe summary: Core SSG implementation with parallel fetching, file writing, and plugin architecture
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: ~90 lines of TypeScript
+- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/router, src/types, src/utils/handler
+- Safe summary: Path utilities and route filtering helpers for static generation with dynamic route detection
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
+- Reads as: ~90 lines of TypeScript
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/helper/ssg/utils
+- Safe summary: Middleware for controlling SSG execution with dynamic route parameters and disable flags
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: export { stream, streamSSE, streamText }
+- Reads as: ~15 lines of TypeScript
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream, src/helper/streaming/sse, src/helper/streaming/text
+- Safe summary: Streaming response export re-exporting stream, SSE, and text stream helpers
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi (imported)
+- Reads as: ~45 lines of TypeScript
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/stream
+- Safe summary: Base streaming API with transform stream, cancellation handling, and Bun version checks
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
+- Reads as: ~100 lines of TypeScript
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/html, src/utils/stream
+- Safe summary: Server-Sent Events streaming with event, id, retry fields and custom headers
+
+## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamText
+- Reads as: ~15 lines of TypeScript
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/stream
+- Safe summary: Text stream helper that sets Content-Type to text/plain with nosniff and chunked encoding
+
+## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: export { accepts }
+- Reads
